query:
SELECT p.id, p.name FROM places p 
LEFT JOIN island_guides ig ON p.name = ig.name AND ig.atoll = 'Baa Atoll'
WHERE p.atollId = 3 AND p.type = 'island' AND ig.id IS NULL
ORDER BY p.name;
